news.t: Private-credit ETFs are here. Why your retirement account may be their next target.
Virtus Introduces Virtus Seix AAA Private Credit CLO ETF

overview.description: The Virtus Seix AAA Private Credit CLO ETF (PCLO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital preservation and current income. The fund invests debt instruments that are backed by a pool of loans to private middle market companies PCLO was launched on Dec 2, 2024 and is issued by Virtus Investment Partners.

data.title: Private-credit ETFs are here. Why your retirement account may be their next target.
data.text: Private-credit ETFs aren't in 401(k)s yet — but they are Wall Street's latest effort to bring private assets to the masses and, eventually, into retirement plans.

data.title: Virtus Introduces Virtus Seix AAA Private Credit CLO ETF
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Virtus Investment Partners, Inc. (NYSE: VRTS) has expanded its offerings of distinctive, actively managed exchange-traded funds with the introduction of the Virtus Seix AAA ...
